text.message: bro u dont have the wheat monopoly lol

I dont understand why orange plowed for sheep port
but you still would owe me a favor, blue

red could have gone everywhere in the map
and decided to try to plow me
Not sure why red is trying to dev a ton lol
sheep port makes sense for red
devs do not make sense for red
if you dont try for it I will likely get it
worse for us if oj gets it

been saving all game for that
